economic_notes: Band has 100% partnership share in Gitanyow Indian Band Limited Partnership (Gas Bar operations, revenue $1,323,799, net loss -$59,099) and 25% non-controlling interest in Meziadin Junction Limited Partnership. BC First Nations Gaming LP revenue of $447,048 received in 2020.
notes: Replacement reserve of $104,905 held separately per CMHC agreement. Ottawa Trust Funds of $227,838 held by federal government (ISC). Two investments accounted for by equity method: Gitanyow Indian Band Limited Partnership (100%, $196,943) and Meziadin Junction Limited Partnership (25%, $45,763). Rental receivable of $1,857,338 fully offset by allowance for doubtful accounts. Land disposal of $127,500 during year. Segment disclosure provided across Administration, Capital Projects, Economic Development, Housing, Operations & Maintenance, Social Services, and Amortization.
